_notes: SFTOnly = SFT-warm-started Qwen2.5-1.5B with NO RL training. Eval-only spec: total_episodes=0 makes infra/app_train_loop.py::_train_loop_impl skip the `for ep in range(n_episodes)` body and go straight to the held-out eval pass. Launch via `modal run infra/app_train_loop.py::train_loop_webshop --config /workspace/configs/SFTOnly.json --n-episodes 0 --eval-episodes 50 --eval-task-id-base 6500 --sft-adapter /vol/checkpoints/sft_v3_<ts> --gpu-mem-util 0.30`. Cost ~$3, ~10 min. The hgpo block is irrelevant when total_episodes=0 but the schema requires a decomposer; `progress` is chosen because it has zero learnable parameters and zero side-effects. Populates methods_comparison.json::SFTOnly.
